<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class Hangup extends TwiML { /** * Hangup constructor. */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('Hangup', null); } /** * Add Parameter child. * * @param array $attributes Optional attributes * @return Parameter Child element. */ public function parameter($attributes = []): Parameter { return $this->nest(new Parameter($attributes)); } }
